name: Submit your Music | Jazz Moods Radio
snippet: Share your music with the rest of the world by submitting your new releases here. For consideration, please send your music in MP3 format along with a CD cover. Jazz Moods Radio reserves the right to refuse music that is not in keeping with our current format. Email submissions to: musicsubmissions@

name: Submit music for radio airplay consideration - Jammin' Jazz
snippet: Music submission for radio airplay consideration in two major music loving cities and online

name: SUBMIT YOUR MUSIC - Funkmania Smooth Jazz
snippet: Are you a artist looking to feature your music on our smooth jazz playlists? Send us your tracks using the form below. name: Submit Music YourJazzRadio.com
snippet: Submit Music Artist Submission We accept submissions from local, national, and international Jazz Artist. Independent artist must complete our Airplay for Exposure Agreement and must submit music to YourJazzRadio.com and our Affiliate Network via our submission form. Record companies can submit work

name: Top jazz radio stations - Submit your music | Groover
snippet: Send your jazz tracks to active radio stations. Get airplay for bebop, swing, fusion and modern jazz. Guaranteed feedback or credits back.

name: 7 Best Sites to Submit Music to Radio Stations - Now Hear This
snippet: Getting your music played on the radio is a big achievement for many independent artists. name: Submit Music to Radio Stations | One Submit — Online radio stations ...
snippet: 400+ online radio stations across every genre — indie, jazz, pop, rock, classical and more. Submit your track, get reviewed, get played. From $4 per submission.

name: Internet Music Promotion | Smooth Jazz | MusicSUBMIT
snippet: Smooth Jazz artists can order up to 200 submissions. Below you'll find just a few sample radio stations & blogs where your music may be submitted. LET'S GET STARTED!

name: SUBMIT MUSIC - smoothjazz.club
snippet: Are you a smooth jazz artist, producer, or record label with a new release? We welcome music submissions for possible airplay on our radio programs.
